title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin describes an approach to scaling an AI-driven code generation system by combining Claude Opus for complex reasoning tasks with Kimi K2.6 for faster implementation work. The strategy allocates expensive reasoning capacity only where it impacts outcomes, maintaining token efficiency as the system scales.
